event: Winter view of the Summer Garden in Leningrad
description: A winter scene rendered in a flat, graphic style showing a snow-covered urban landscape. A canal or river runs through the center, spanned by a bridge. Bare trees with snow-laden branches stand along the right bank behind an iron railing. Buildings with warm-toned roofs are visible in the background through the misty atmosphere. The palette is almost entirely white and pale gray with touches of warm peach on the distant buildings. The date 1929 appears in the lower right corner.
